exploration_notes: The ADS implementation in Envoy lives entirely under source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/. There are two parallel implementations: (1) a legacy one (Config::GrpcMuxImpl in grpc_mux_impl.cc/.h and Config::NewGrpcMuxImpl in new_grpc_mux_impl.cc/.h) and (2) a unified/newer one (Config::XdsMux::GrpcMuxImpl template in xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc/.h, instantiated as GrpcMuxDelta and GrpcMuxSotw). The gRPC stream handling is in grpc_stream.h (GrpcStream template) with failover support in grpc_mux_
